title: Scuro's Furniture
description: Add a lot of furniture to your world!
body:
## What's about this mod?
This mod adds a lot of furniture in your world! You can organise you storage using drawers and cabinets, make your kitchen or alchemy room looks more fancy.

## Advantages
- Full support of any(or almost) resourcepack
- Good API. You can create addon with custom wood-types blocks. API provides data-gen methods, so it will be easy

# Also check my other mods:

### [Scuro's MoreXP](https://modrinth.com/mod/scuros-more-xp)
